ModuleTitle.helper: Internal only. This syncs with the DNN module title and does not display to visitors.

ModuleAnchor.helper: Optional. Used for #anchor-links on the page. Use letters, numbers, and hyphens only.

SectionHeading.helper: Optional. Main heading for this section.

SectionIntro.helper: Optional. Short supporting text below the heading. Basic HTML is allowed.
SectionIntro.placeholder: Programs designed to be modular and responsive to your group's current state.

Eyebrow.helper: Optional. Short label shown on the right side of the heading row. Basic HTML is allowed.

Cards.helper: Add as many cards as you want. Only the first 3 cards are rendered on the page.

Title.helper: Required. Card heading. Basic HTML is allowed.

Icon.helper: Find icons at FontAwesome. Example: fas fa-building

Body.helper: Required. Main card copy. Basic HTML is allowed.
Body.placeholder: A sequence of 'invitations' designed to slow the heart rate and open the senses...

Link.helper: Optional. If added, the entire card becomes clickable.

Tags.helper: Optional. Add short bullet-style highlights. Basic HTML is allowed.
